title: You Are Free
overview: Dennis, cast out of a top-tier adventuring party, decides to follow his dreams and open his own restaurant.

title: It's Crazy Delicious!
overview: The Adventurer's Restaurant is open at last, and their first customer is...someone wearing full plate armor?!

title: That's an Adventurer!
overview: A boy named Vivia comes to the restaurant. He's been cast out of his party, so he may deign to join a new one.

title: Then, I'll Have the Daily Special
overview: Bachel has been thoroughly ground down by her crushing workload. Then another scolding pushes her to the edge.

title: It's Too Soon for a Marriage Proposal!
overview: The restaurant is booming, but Dennis is worried about Atelier! Katie approaches Dennis with a request.

title: I've Come for Lady Atelier
overview: The Workstatt family butler arrives to retrieve Atelier. He tells Dennis and the others of her tragic past.

title: Get Better Soon
overview: The restaurant is packed, but Dennis falls ill. As he dreams of his youth, the others try to cook for him.

title: Today, We Are Closed for Business Reasons
overview: It's a cause for celebration as three of the regulars at the restaurant have acquired new jobs. While the group soaks in the hot springs and enjoys some barbecue, a shadow lurks around the temporarily closed establishment.

title: If It's Important to You, Then Please Don't Let Go of It!
overview: Dennis and Atelier decide to leave town to protect their friends, but familiar figures block their way.

title: The Higher and Further Away a Place Is, the More I Aim to Reach It
overview: Dennis and the others continue preparing for battle. Vigo thinks back on what he's done to get this far.
